description: Perform a quarterly pipeline review for three stalled opportunities in the 'Qualified' stage: 'Cloud Migration - Hyperion Systems', 'ERP Implementation - Zenith Corp', and 'Consulting Retainer - Apex Global'. Based on the 'Internal Notes' for each opportunity, update the records accordingly: mark as Lost with the reason 'Too Expensive' if the deal was lost due to price; add the 'At Risk' tag and set Priority to Low (0 stars) if the deal is in trouble; or move the opportunity to the 'Negotiation' stage and set Probability to 90% if there is a verbal agreement. Ensure all updates are saved.
